components.value: V, S, M/DF (a drop of clear oil)

area.value: one touched object of up to 10 pounds/level

description.value: As protection from energy, except as noted above and that the spell only protects against acid and fire damage. While the energy protection remains, the item is also completely waterproof (this protection extends to other liquids as well, such as alcohol and oil).
